Surname.jp: 忠義を尽くす護衛騎士

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52151_1]</color> chance to increase the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52151_1] turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52151_1]</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52151_1]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52151_1]</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52151_1]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52151_1]</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52151_1]回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52152_1]</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52152_1] turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52152_1]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52152_1]ターン</color>の間付与する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52152_1]</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52152_1]턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52152_1]</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52152_1]回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52153_1]</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52153_1] turn(s)</color>.\nIncreases damage dealt proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52153_1]</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52153_1]ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52153_1]</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52153_1]턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52153_1]</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52153_1]回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
